name: todo-app-example
description: Todo app example demonstrating redux-retro and react-redux-retro together, with localStorage persistence and a mockable storage interface for testing
_note: redux-retro and react-redux-retro are referenced via local file: paths for monorepo development. If you are using this example outside the monorepo, change 'file:../../packages/redux-retro' to 'redux-retro' and 'file:../../packages/react-redux-retro' to 'react-redux-retro', then run npm install.
